---
name: Component Request
about: Request a new UI component to be added to UI Patterns
title: "[Component]: "
labels: ["component-request", "needs-triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Component Name

<!-- What should the component be called? e.g. `DatePicker`, `Accordion`, `Toast` -->

## Category

<!-- Where does this component belong? -->
- [ ] components/ — General-purpose UI elements
- [ ] layouts/ — Page and section layouts
- [ ] forms/ — Form inputs and controls
- [ ] feedback/ — Alerts, toasts, progress indicators
- [ ] navigation/ — Menus, breadcrumbs, tabs
- [ ] overlays/ — Modals, drawers, tooltips
- [ ] data-display/ — Tables, cards, lists

## Description

<!-- Describe what this component does and why it would be valuable. -->

## Desired API / Props

```tsx
// Example usage you would like to see
<ComponentName
  prop1="value"
  prop2={true}
  onAction={() => {}}
/>
```

## Accessibility Requirements

<!-- Any WCAG / ARIA requirements this component should satisfy. -->

## References

<!-- Links to similar components in other libraries (Radix, shadcn/ui, Headless UI, etc.) -->

## Would you be willing to contribute this component?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to open a pull request for this.
- [ ] No, I'm just suggesting it.
